info.name: Auditing / HTTP Client Logging
info.summary: Logs all outgoing HTTP requests made by Nextcloud's internal HTTP client.
info.description: Extends admin_audit with logging of all outgoing HTTP requests made by Nextcloud's internal Guzzle-based HTTP client. Logs include method, URI, status code, HTTP version, request/response headers, cURL transfer statistics, and compression metrics. No UI, no routes — pure audit logging to /var/log/nextcloud/client/.
info.author: [ernolf] - Raphael Gradenwitz
